scripts.dev: npm run build -w @jp/shared && concurrently -n api,worker -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @jp/api" "npm run dev -w @jp/worker"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @jp/shared && npm run gen:client && npm run build -w @jp/client && npm run build -w @jp/api && npm run build -w @jp/worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @jp/shared && npm run gen:client && npm run typecheck -w @jp/shared && npm run typecheck -w @jp/client && npm run typecheck -w @jp/api && npm run typecheck -w @jp/worker
